moments.author: Demis Hassabis
moments.quote: Proposes a FINRA‑style ‘Frontier AI Standards Body’ for pre‑release model reviews.
moments.why: It’s going viral as the most serious and influential call yet for self‑regulated, U.S.‑led AI oversight.
moments.url: TechCrunch coverage of his X post

moments.author: Tom Brady
moments.quote: Called Logan Paul a “dork” and “nerd” after a staged slap moment at Fanatics Fest.
moments.why: Wild crossover pop‑culture moment that’s lighting up sports and meme feeds.
moments.url: Yahoo Sports coverage of his post
